S.FORM: Brandon Bass unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u p'agal tins' tay suruw. 4 bulad 30 demiad, 1985 a mihca, Brandon Bass, miunduay.
S.PHON: brandon bass unu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, u pʔ~ʡagar~ɾ tinsʔ~ʡ taj suruw. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, brandon bass, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Brandon Bass unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u p'agal tins' tay suruw. 4 bulad 30 demiad, 1985 a mihca, Brandon Bass, miunduay.
S.PHON: brandon bass unu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, u pʔ~ʡagar~ɾ tinsʔ~ʡ taj suruw. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, brandon bass, miunduaj.
